chapter_title.en: Chapter on the State of believers' Children Who Pass Away

text: 4737 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: "مَاتَ إِبْرَاهِيمُ وَ لَهُ ثَمَانِيَةَ عَشَرَ شَهْراً فَأَتَمَّ اَللَّهُ رَضَاعَهُ فِي اَلْجَنَّةِ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.4737 - Imam (as) said: "Ibrahim (the son of the Prophet) died at the age of eighteen months, and Allah (swt) completed his breastfeeding in Paradise."
